lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭਨੀ ਜਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham pooran paramesar rav rahiaa sabhanee jaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, the Perfect Transcendent Lord, is pervading everywhere. ||Pause||
O Saints, there is peace everywhere.
It eradicates all anxiety.
The Lord is merciful, kind and compassionate.
The Bani of His Word emanated from the Primal Lord.
Nanak chants the Naam, the Name of the True Lord. ||2||13||77||
Here and hereafter, He is our Savior.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
God, the True Guru, is Merciful to the meek.
He Himself protects His slaves.
In each and every heart, the Beautiful Word of His Shabad resounds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਊਪਰਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan aoopar bal jaaee |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Guru's Feet.
He Himself has become my help and support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਮਾਲੀ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਸਭਨੀ ਥਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dinas rain saas saas samaalee pooran sabhanee thaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: Day and night, with each and every breath, I remember Him; He is totally pervading and permeating all places. ||Pause||
Glorious and great is devotional worship to You.
Nanak has found God's Sanctuary. ||2||14||78||
True is the support of the True Lord.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
When it was pleasing to the Perfect True Guru,
then I chanted the Naam, the Name of the Pervading Lord.
The Lord of the Universe extended His Mercy to me,
and God saved my honor. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਛਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਬਿਰਥੀ ਆਸ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo ichheh soee fal paaveh birathee aas na jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever fruit one desires, he receives; his hopes shall not go in vain. ||1||Pause||
The Lord's feet are forever peace-giving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਨਪਤਿ ਦਾਤਾ ਸੋਈ ਸੰਤੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa kare jis praanapat daataa soee sant gun gaavai |
lines.english: That Saint, unto whom the Lord of Life, the Great Giver, extends His Mercy - he alone sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਣਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat taa kaa man leenaa paarabraham man bhaavai |2|
lines.english: His soul is absorbed in loving devotional worship; his mind is pleasing to the Supreme Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਜਸੁ ਰਵਣਾ ਬਿਖੈ ਠਗਉਰੀ ਲਾਥੀ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har kaa jas ravanaa bikhai tthgauree laathee |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, he chants the Praises of the Lord, and the bitter poison does not affect him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਲੀਆ ਮੇਰੈ ਕਰਤੈ ਸੰਤ ਸਾਧ ਭਏ ਸਾਥੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sang milaae leea merai karatai sant saadh bhe saathee |3|
lines.english: My Creator Lord has united me with Himself, and the Holy Saints have become my companions. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਸਰਬਸੁ ਦੀਨੇ ਆਪਹਿ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar geh leene sarabas deene aapeh aap milaaeaa |
lines.english: Taking me by the hand, He has given me everything, and blended me with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਥੋਕ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੧੫॥੭੯॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak sarab thok pooran pooraa satigur paaeaa |4|15|79|
lines.english: Says Nanak, everything has been perfectly resolved; I have found the Perfect True Guru. ||4||15||79||
Humility is my spiked club.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
The Perfect Guru has given me this understanding. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਕੋ ਨ ਟਿਕੈ ਵੇਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: eis aagai ko na ttikai vekaaree |
lines.english: No evil-doer can withstand these weapons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਓਟਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam santan kee ottaa |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is the support and shelter of the Saints.
My dagger is to be the dust of all men's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਉਧਰਹਿ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੋਟਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo simarai tis kee gat hovai udhareh sagale kottaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who remembers the Lord in meditation, is emancipated; millions have been saved in this way. ||1||Pause||
In the Society of the Saints, I sing His Praises.
I see the Supreme Lord God everywhere. ||2||16||80||
Says Nanak, I have eradicated my self-conceit.
I have found this, the perfect wealth of the Lord.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
The Perfect Guru has done it perfectly.
He blessed me with forgiveness.
I have found lasting peace and bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਨੀ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਕਿਨ ਹੀ ਜਾਤੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai kirapaa kar deenee viralai kin hee jaatee | rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru, by His Grace, gave it to me; how rare are those who know this. ||Pause||
Devotional worship to the Lord is what gives rewards.
Everywhere, the people dwell in peace. ||1||
That is always rewarding and peace-giving.
Sing the Word of the Guru's Bani, O Siblings of Destiny.
He has realized his pre-ordained destiny. ||2||17||81||
Nanak has meditated on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
